---
title: "Journalism education in the post-truth era: An exploration of the voices of journalism students in Greece and Cyprus"
author: "Theodosiadou S., Spyridou P-L., Panayiotou N., Milioni D. and Papa, V."
date: 2021-01-01
description: "Media Practice and Education, 22(1), 1-14."
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/placeholder.png
---
